name: expo
label: Expo (React Native)
description: Head-start package for Expo / React Native apps, both platforms. iOS: simulator-based Maestro acceptance slice (/uat → uat-runner) with the Expo-iOS launch knowledge it depends on (xcodebuild fallback, Metro port guard, persisted-session auth). Android: emulator launch (CLI-only SDK, stale-prebuild guard, per-checkout Metro port), emulator Maestro UAT, app-identity (launcher-label leak), and the EAS → Play internal-testing ship pipeline. Plus a domain-agnostic fork⇄upstream sync runbook (promotable). Learns each project's conventions on top.
